daddiu r2, r0, 1          -> 01100100000000100000000000000001 (0x64020001)
daddiu r3, r0, 2          -> 01100100000000110000000000000010 (0x64030002)
daddu r1, r2, r3          -> 00000000010000110000100000101101 (0x0043082D)
daddiu r3, r0, 2          -> 01100100000000110000000000000010 (0x64030002)
ddiv r1, r3               -> 00000000001000110000000000011110 (0x0023001E)
mflo r2                   -> 00000000000000000001000000010010 (0x00001012)
daddiu r3, r0, 2          -> 01100100000000110000000000000010 (0x64030002)
daddu r1, r2, r3          -> 00000000010000110000100000101101 (0x0043082D)
sd r1, a(r0)              -> 11111100000000010000000000000000 (0xFC010000)
